name: provenance manifest generation-time consumption block carries standards_state per the schema
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf '{"commit":"abc","standards_state":{"owasp-asvs":{"content_hash":"x","fetched_at":"t","freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency"}}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-consumption-schema.sh" --manifest .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json --check standards-state 2>out.txt && grep -q 'standards_state_present=true' out.txt && grep -q 'sources_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
